economic_notes: Kehewin Power Trust holds 75 Class A LP units in Indigenous Communities Syndicate LP, participating in the $1.5B Cascade Power Project (900MW natural gas plant near Edson AB, expected completion 2023). AIOC providing $93M in loan guarantees to LP. LP partners include Alexis Nakota Sioux Nation, Enoch Cree Nation, Kehewin Cree Nation, O'Chiese First Nation, Paul First Nation and Whitefish Lake First Nation.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Three trusts consolidated: Kehewin Legacy Trust, Kehewin Treaty Land Entitlement Trust, Kehewin Specific Claims Settlement Trust. Three entities on modified equity method: 681415 Alberta Ltd. (Kehewin Gasification), Kwayaskwaw Contracting Ltd., Kehewin Power Trust. Three entities on cost method: Pimee Kehewin General Store LP, SLS Metalworks & Fabricating LP, Pimee Education Foundation. Two shell entities with no activity: 2270305 Alberta Ltd. and 2334773 Alberta Ltd. Impairment of TCA of $860,000 recorded. Term loans due on demand of $5,720,510 appeared in 2021 (nil in 2020). Large variance in ISC funding between years ($24.98M in 2021 vs $38.84M in 2020). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Tribal Chiefs + FNIH Health Branch + TCETSA + FNDF + CMHC + Government of Alberta = 24979987+516546+6449301+667138+316812+280171+145000 = 33354955. OSR = 39471224 - 33354955 = 6116269. Restricted cash includes capital projects ($3,639,767), CMHC ($55,089), funds held in trust ($50,392). Schedule of remuneration not included in extracted text.
